description: Catalog of CLI and developer tools used across the FlexNetOS meta workspace.

tools.summary: GPU-aware, source-building environment manager for the workstation. Each tool is a TOML component with an idempotent install/auto-fix/reset lifecycle, a dependency DAG (graph --impact / --why), a content-hashed lockfile (lock --check), and a read-only doctor.
tools.notes: Sibling to vault_hub:kasetto — both are declarative environment managers. envctl targets the local workstation/GPU box (builds tools from source); kasetto targets reproducible AI-agent skill environments.
